title: Conflict de-escalation pause protocol
summary: Separate immediate safety from the disputed issue, lower voices, reduce the audience, identify needs, and appoint a neutral timekeeper.
content: Separate immediate safety from the disputed issue, lower voices, reduce the audience, identify needs, and appoint a neutral timekeeper. Pause the decision when fatigue, weapons, intoxication, threats, or loss of control are present and move to safety. Do not surround, shame, touch, corner, or threaten a distressed person.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Conflict de-escalation pause protocol”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Conflict de-escalation pause protocol»
steps: Separate immediate safety from the disputed issue, lower voices, reduce the audience, identify needs, and appoint a neutral timekeeper.
Pause the decision when fatigue, weapons, intoxication, threats, or loss of control are present and move to safety.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
warnings: Do not surround, shame, touch, corner, or threaten a distressed person.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Conflict de-escalation pause protocol.
short_term: For Conflict de-escalation pause protocol, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Conflict de-escalation pause protocol, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Conflict de-escalation pause protocol, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Conflict de-escalation pause protocol to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
